inputs.prompt: Story: A chemical spill at an industrial site has forced the evacuation of 500 homes in the surrounding area. Emergency services are on scene. The company has not yet issued a statement. The reporter is at the cordon. Programme: Afternoon News. Duration: 3 minutes. Key facts: Spill detected at 11am, evacuation ordered at 11:30am, 500 homes within 1km radius, one person treated for breathing difficulties, substance not yet identified.
Story: University student protest about tuition fees. Reporter is on campus. Programme: Evening drive show. Duration: 2 minutes.

Story: The European Commission has announced a formal investigation into subsidies received by a major Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer selling cars in the EU. The investigation could result in tariffs of up to 45%. Reporter is at the Commission headquarters in Brussels. Programme: European Breakfast News. Duration: 4 minutes. Key facts: Investigation covers three manufacturers, provisional tariffs possible within 9 months, Chinese government has called the investigation protectionist, European car industry lobby split on whether tariffs help or harm.
